[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111110 5
1 1110111 6
2 0111111 6
3 1101100 4
4 1011101 5
5 0011111 5
6 1111111 a
7 1011000 3

01 10 0111101 5
12 21 0101101 4
23 32 0011111 5 match 5
34 43 1011011 5
45 54 1011000 3 match 7
56 65 1011110 5
67 76 1111111 a match 6
70 07 1111111 a match 6

13 31 0111111 6 match 2
24 42 1001101 4
35 53 1011011 5
46 64 1011110 5
57 75 1111111 a match 6
60 06 0111111 6 match 2
71 17 1111111 a match 6

03 30 0111111 6 match 2
14 41 1101100 4 match 3
25 52 1011101 5 match 4
36 63 0011111 5 match 5
47 74 1111111 a match 6
50 05 1111101 6
61 16 0111110 5 match 0
72 27 1110111 6 match 1

04 40 1111101 6
15 51 1111100 5
26 62 0011111 5 match 5
37 73 1111111 a match 6
